_preview:
| Sign        | Mood     | Lucky# | Colour   | Coffee | Bug Energy | Deploy?      |
|-------------|----------|--------|----------|--------|------------|--------------|
| Aries       | Sleepy   | 3      | Red      | 5/5    | Low        | Yes          |
| Taurus      | Anxious  | 4      | Green    | 2/5    | Medium     | Maybe        |
| Gemini      | Happy    | 5      | Yellow   | 4/5    | High       | No           |
| Cancer      | Sleepy   | 8      | Silver   | 2/5    | Low        | Maybe        |
| Leo         | Proud    | 7      | Gold     | 4/5    | Low        | Yes          |
| Virgo       | Happy    | 6      | Green    | 3/5    | High       | No           |
| Libra       | Romantic | 9      | Pink     | 3/5    | Low        | Yes          |
| Scorpio     | Sleepy   | 4      | Purple   | 5/5    | High       | No           |
| Sagittarius | Proud    | 3      | Orange   | 4/5    | Low        | Yes          |
| Capricorn   | Proud    | 9      | Brown    | 3/5    | Medium     | Maybe        |
| Aquarius    | Romantic | 4      | Blue     | 2/5    | Medium     | Maybe        |
| Pisces      | Anxious  | 8      | Teal     | 5/5    | High       | No           |

aries.horoscope_text: The fiery energy of the day is helping you press on with projects you have in the works. Set things in motion now, Aries. Move out of the background and onto center stage. Your rocket is fueled and ready to take off. All you have to do now is ignite the engine. Use the power of your emotions to deliver a boost that will propel you to the stars.
aries.deploy_today: Yes — your rocket is fueled. Ship it before the energy fades.
aries.prophecy: The stars say you're ready for liftoff. 🚀 Your local dev environment is not.

taurus.horoscope_text: You might be charged with energy but feel you have nowhere to aim it, Taurus. The force is there, but the goal may not be. Talking with others may only confuse you. Listen to yourself. You know yourself better than anyone else does. You have nothing to fear. Don't let doubt consume you. If it doesn't seem like the right time to make a move, don't worry. There's nothing wrong with stillness.
taurus.deploy_today: Maybe — the force is there but the goal is not. Classic sprint planning energy.
taurus.prophecy: You have energy but no clear goal. Your ticket backlog has the same problem.

gemini.horoscope_text: Arguments that have been brewing are coming to a climactic point for you, Gemini. Don't be surprised if heated opposition rears its head today. This is likely a result of your own doing. Cycles of anger are reaching a critical point, and your stubborn character is butting heads with an equally strong force. Try not to take yourself too seriously. Life is meant to be fun. Our objective is to be happy.
gemini.deploy_today: No — you're already in a fight with one strong force. Don't add prod.
gemini.prophecy: The stars say life is meant to be fun. Your code review disagrees. 🔥

cancer.horoscope_text: There is no need to frown when another person walks by just because you don't know that person, Cancer. You must break the habit of living your life in fear. Take active steps toward curing this trend by not stepping down when strong forces try to intimidate you with brute strength. Promote the picture of peace and serenity that you have inside your head. Bring out more of your inner self.
cancer.deploy_today: Maybe — the stars say step up. Your test coverage says otherwise.
cancer.prophecy: The universe says don't be intimidated by strong forces. Your senior dev left 47 comments. Good luck. 😴

leo.horoscope_text: A blast of energy is headed your way today, Leo. You'll find that there is no shortage of adrenaline in your system. Don't delay - there are opportunities now that may not be there for you later. Action is the name of the game. You'll be noticed and properly rewarded for your efforts. Your emotions have a great deal of strength now.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — you will be noticed and rewarded. Just make sure it actually works.
leo.prophecy: A blast of energy is headed your way. So is a P0 incident. Pace yourself. 😏

virgo.horoscope_text: You could run into some emotional roadblocks today, Virgo. This could be due to a lack of honesty on your part. Make sure you're sticking to the truth at all times. A strong, forceful energy could challenge your ego. Don't be surprised if this force is emotionally highly charged. Conflict is apt to result if you aren't honest about your feelings as soon as they arise.
virgo.deploy_today: No — emotional roadblocks ahead. Don't let prod feel them too.
virgo.prophecy: The stars say be honest about your feelings. Your PR description says 'minor changes'. 😁

libra.horoscope_text: There is a fun-loving, boisterous energy to the day that should give you a great deal of power and self-confidence. You'll be extremely effective in everything you put your hand to, Libra. Remember to love yourself and believe in the things you say and do. Generate passionate love from your heart. No one will be able to respond with anything but the same.
libra.deploy_today: Yes — extremely effective at everything. Including writing the incident report.
libra.prophecy: You'll be effective at everything you touch today. Someone else will touch your code at 5pm. 😍

scorpio.horoscope_text: You might be getting a bit forceful with your emotions today, Scorpio. Don't be surprised if you're like a fire-breathing dragon when you speak. Sparks are apt to fly. Strong feelings have been building up inside you. Now is the time to release them in all their intensity. People need to hear the things you have to say. You're doing yourself and others a disservice by keeping it all bottled up inside.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — you're already breathing fire. Production doesn't need the same energy.
scorpio.prophecy: The stars say release your strong feelings. Please not in the PR review thread. 🔥

sagittarius.horoscope_text: This is a fantastic day for you, Sagittarius. You'll have a great deal of physical power. Engage in activities that put this strength to good use. Tackle projects vigorously and feel free to speak up. Make sure that the whole world knows that you're handling every task. People would be unwise to cross you today, because you have a great deal of warrior energy and won't hesitate to strike back.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — warrior energy is on your side. Deploy before 3pm when it wears off.
sagittarius.prophecy: A fantastic day. People would be unwise to cross you. Your linter will try anyway. 😏

capricorn.horoscope_text: This is a good day to stand up for yourself and make it known that you aren't a pushover, Capricorn. Use the powerful energy of the day to follow through on projects that may have lost momentum. Pick up the reins and take control of the direction of your life. Feel free to be more aggressive than you normally would. Show others your incredible worth.
capricorn.deploy_today: Maybe — follow through on that stalled PR. Test it first this time.
capricorn.prophecy: The stars say follow through on projects that lost momentum. You have 6 open PRs from March. 😏

aquarius.horoscope_text: If you want to shine brightly, Aquarius, then do so. Maintaining balance includes sometimes being a bit selfish. Feel free to radiate your beauty to the world. If you aren't in a situation that makes you happy, change the situation. There's no reason for you to be miserable. Don't allow yourself to be pushed around by other people's whims. Be free, be yourself, even if it means you might create tension with others.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — be free, be yourself. Just warn the team first.
aquarius.prophecy: The stars say don't be pushed around by other people's whims. Your sprint backlog has 24 tickets assigned by other people's whims. 😍

pisces.horoscope_text: People would be wise to get out of your way today, Pisces. You might find yourself feeling like a steam engine that's stoked to the brim with fiery hot coals. You're likely to be adamant about your course, and no one is going to be able to pull you off track. If people look carefully, they might even be able to see the steam coming out of your ears.
pisces.deploy_today: No — steam is already coming out of your ears. Don't let it come out of prod too.
pisces.prophecy: No one can pull you off track today. Your Slack notifications are about to try. 😰
